description: A dual-month date range picker built on top of `v-date-picker`. Shows two adjacent months side-by-side with a single shared range selection.

props.independentMonths: Decouples the two calendar panels so each month can be navigated independently.

events.update:modelValue: Emitted when the range selection changes.

slots.footer: Slot rendered below the calendar panels. Sits inside the picker container so it does not span across externally composed siblings such as a presets sidebar.
